ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number where the data is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the data segment */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the data segment */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the data segment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data segment */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content percentage */,
  "mean_coverage" REAL /* Mean coverage of the data segment */,
  "normalized_coverage" REAL /* Normalized coverage value */,
  "min_normalized_coverage" REAL /* Minimum normalized coverage value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Quality control status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study objectives and methods */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of research study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is based */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, bioinformatician, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of updates made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis performed (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software used to perform the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being assessed */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., coverage, completeness) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date when the quality was checked */,
  "pass_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for passing the quality check */,
  "fail_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for failing the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of genomic data */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., external database, lab) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene, variant) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)
